option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
{# ── hreflang alternate links (set in article frontmatter) ── #} {% if translations %} {% for t in translations %} {% endfor %} {% endif %} {# ── Open Graph ── #} {% if slug and date %} {% set _ogImage = date | postImagePath(slug) %} {% if _ogImage %} {% endif %} {% endif %}
{{ content | safe }}

MindRefactor

© {{ site.currentYear }} MindRefactor. All rights reserved.

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
{# ── Canonical URL ── #} {# ── hreflang alternate links (set in article frontmatter) ── #} {% if translations %} {% for t in translations %} {% endfor %} {% endif %} {# ── RSS feed ── #} {# ── Resolve OG image ── #} {% if slug and date %} {% set _ogImage = date | postImagePath(slug) %} {% endif %} {% if not _ogImage %} {% set _ogImage = "/assets/img/mind-refactor-home.png" %} {% endif %} {# ── Open Graph ── #} {# ── Twitter Card ── #} {# ── JSON-LD Structured Data ── #} {% if layout == "article.njk" %} {% else %} {% endif %}
{{ content | safe }}

MindRefactor

© {{ site.currentYear }} MindRefactor. All rights reserved.

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: --- layout: null permalink: /feed.xml eleventyExcludeFromCollections: true --- <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <feed xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom"> <title>{{ site.title }}</title> <subtitle>{{ site.description }}</subtitle> <link href="{{ site.url }}/feed.xml" rel="self" type="application/atom+xml" /> <link href="{{ site.url }}/en/" rel="alternate" type="text/html" /> <id>{{ site.url }}/</id> <updated>{{ collections.postsEn[0].date | dateToRfc3339 }}</updated> <author> <name>{{ site.author.name }}</name> <uri>{{ site.author.url }}</uri> </author> {% for post in collections.postsEn | head(20) %} <entry> <title>{{ post.data.title }}</title> <link href="{{ site.url }}{{ post.url }}" rel="alternate" type="text/html" /> <id>{{ site.url }}{{ post.url }}</id> <published>{{ post.date | dateToRfc3339 }}</published> <updated>{{ post.date | dateToRfc3339 }}</updated> {% if post.data.description %} <summary>{{ post.data.description }}</summary> {% endif %} <content type="html">{{ post.templateContent | htmlToAbsoluteUrls(site.url + post.url) }}</content> <author> <name>{{ site.author.name }}</name> </author> </entry> {% endfor %} </feed>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
--- layout: null permalink: /robots.txt eleventyExcludeFromCollections: true --- User-agent: * Allow: /
Sitemap: {{ site.url }}/sitemap.xml
